title: Barometry
body:
Modifies Minecraft's clouds to be more stylized, with different textures for rain and thunder, also makes them render further out.

![Showcase.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u8S5swGv/images/522b03913a72c1b751e9970c7b1af80f23aebf6d.webp)

**Mod will not work properly with Sodium unless you disable Sodium's cloud mixin!**

> sodium-mixins.properties:
> ```properties
> mixin.features.render.world.clouds=false
> ```
